hero.name: Abdellahi Ahmed
hero.headline_line2: from the screen to the wire.
hero.description: Full-stack developer shipping across product and infrastructure. Next.js, React, Flutter, Supabase and TypeScript on the product side. PHP, MySQL and Dolibarr when enterprise ERP comes into play. CCNA-certified, with Python and Nmap when the network layer needs reasoning about. Few developers cover both the product and the infrastructure beneath it — that's the point.
hero.currently_text: At MCS Consulting — delivering Dolibarr ERP modules and production web apps. Side work: AutoNetConfig, a Python + Nmap toolkit for network discovery and auto-configuration. Open to Summer 2026 full-stack and software engineering roles.
about.title: My Journey
about.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer shipping production web, mobile, ERP and business applications — backed by a CCNA networking foundation and hands-on Python network automation.
about.story1: I'm a Full-Stack Developer based in Nouakchott, Mauritania. I ship software across the whole stack — a published mobile app on the App Store and Google Play, a Next.js crypto trading platform with KYC and wallets, an Arabic-first RTL news CMS, six custom Dolibarr ERP modules in production, and a Python + Nmap toolkit for network automation. Next.js, React, Flutter, Supabase, TypeScript on the product side; PHP, MySQL and Dolibarr when enterprise ERP comes into play; CCNA networking when the wire matters.
about.story2: On my own time I shipped Traiteurs to the App Store and Google Play — a Flutter + Supabase catering platform with Bankily, Masrivi and Sedad mobile-money rails — and co-built AutoNetConfig, a Python + Nmap toolkit for network discovery and auto-configuration. At MCS Consulting (Dec 2025 – Apr 2026) I deliver custom Dolibarr ERP modules in PHP/MySQL alongside production web work: a document management system with audit-level data handling, a bilingual RTL medical website, and an internal point-of-sale platform under active development.
about.story3: REST APIs, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Row-Level Security, Docker, Linux, Git — those are the basics. The differentiator is the breadth: real shipped products, real enterprise ERP delivery, and CCNA-grade reasoning about the network beneath. I'm actively looking for full-stack and software engineering roles where the whole stack — screen to wire — needs someone who can hold it together.
skills.title: My Expertise
skills.subtitle: Three pillars covering the whole stack — product engineering on the screen, backend and enterprise systems beneath, network automation on the wire.

network.title: Network Engineering & Automation
network.subtitle: Cisco CCNA, Python, Nmap, EVE-NG, GNS3, Packet Tracer
points: Design and validate multi-router / multi-switch topologies in EVE-NG, GNS3 and Packet Tracer before production cutover.
Co-built AutoNetConfig — a Python + Nmap toolkit that scans, visualises and auto-configures network infrastructure.
Run live network analysis, monitoring and troubleshooting across production-like environments.

automation.title: Backend & Enterprise Systems
automation.subtitle: PHP, MySQL, Dolibarr modules, REST APIs, business workflows
points: Deliver custom Dolibarr ERP modules in PHP/MySQL covering client, supplier, order, invoice and payment workflows.
Build and maintain internal business applications — document management, a point-of-sale and client websites — alongside the ERP layer.
Translate operational requirements into structured data models, role-based access and audit-ready document fields.

frontend.title: Product Engineering — Web & Mobile
frontend.subtitle: Next.js, React, Flutter, Supabase, Node.js, TypeScript
points: Architect and ship full-stack web and mobile products — Traiteurs (live on the App Store and Google Play), the OxCoreX crypto platform, and the Sadara Media Arabic-RTL news CMS.
Build secure Supabase backends with Auth, Postgres, Storage, Realtime and Row-Level Security.
Integrate REST APIs, mobile-money rails (Bankily, Masrivi, Sedad) and complex business logic across web and mobile.

experience.title: Professional Journey
experience.description: Where I've shipped what, and what stack carried it.

experience.jobs.description: Developed technical, communication, and project management skills through club projects. Python, Java, OOP, Git, GitHub.
achievements: Led technical workshops and managed cross-functional club projects.
Developed strong communication and technical leadership skills in Python and Java environments.

experience.jobs.description: Built advanced virtual labs using Cisco Packet Tracer and GNS3. Completed CCNA through hands-on labs. Developed automated network workflows with Python.
achievements: Architected and simulated advanced enterprise network topologies using Cisco Packet Tracer and GNS3.
Engineered automated network discovery and configuration workflows using Python scripting.

experience.jobs.description: Designed and validated multi-router / multi-switch topologies in EVE-NG, GNS3 and Packet Tracer before production cutover, while co-building AutoNetConfig — a Python + Nmap toolkit for network discovery, visualisation and auto-configuration.
achievements: Co-built AutoNetConfig — a Python + Nmap toolkit that scans, visualises and auto-configures network infrastructure (host & port discovery, topology mapping).
Ran live network analysis, monitoring and troubleshooting on production-like topologies built in EVE-NG, GNS3 and Packet Tracer.

experience.jobs.description: Full-Stack Developer at MCS Consulting — a firm specialised in financial consulting, ERP solutions and digital transformation. Delivered custom Dolibarr ERP modules in PHP/MySQL while contributing to production web applications, client-facing websites and an internal point-of-sale app currently under development.
achievements: Delivered 6 custom Dolibarr ERP modules in PHP/MySQL covering the client → supplier → order → invoice → payment chain.

Developed and maintained production web projects including Gestion Archivage & Courrier and Clinique El Ihsan, and contributed to an internal point-of-sale web application currently under development.
Integrated REST APIs, improved UI components and supported backend architecture, debugging and MySQL performance tuning using Git/GitHub on a Linux development environment.

projects.title: My Work
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work in web, mobile, and network automation.
projects.responsibilities: Architected and developed the complete solution

projects.items.title: Traiteurs App
projects.items.description: Flutter + Supabase catering platform shipped to the App Store. Connects clients, caterers and drivers in real time, with integrated Mauritanian mobile-money rails (Bankily, Masrivi, Sedad). Backend built on Supabase Auth, Postgres, Storage, Realtime and Row-Level Security.

projects.items.title: OxCoreX
projects.items.description: Full-stack crypto trading platform built with Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase and Tailwind CSS. Includes USDT wallet, KYC flow, referral system, notifications and a complete admin dashboard — backed by Supabase Auth, Postgres, Row-Level Security and role-based access.

projects.items.title: Sadara Media
projects.items.description: Arabic-first RTL news platform built on Next.js with server-side rendering for SEO. Delivered an editorial RTL interface inspired by the Sadara visual identity, a custom CMS for article drafting, publishing workflow, media uploads and category management, a rich homepage and a complete back office — polished across mobile, tablet and desktop.

projects.items.title: AutoNetConfig
projects.items.description: Python + Nmap toolkit co-built during the Moov Mauritel internship for scanning, visualising and auto-configuring network infrastructure. Implements Nmap-based discovery for hosts, open ports and topology mapping, with a hybrid real-time visualisation layer over Flask to render discovered topologies and device relationships.

projects.items.title: MCS Consulting
projects.items.description: Official corporate website for MCS Consulting, a firm specialized in financial consulting and ERP solutions. Delivered a high-performance, responsive digital presence that strengthens the firm's brand identity and serves as a primary lead generation tool for enterprise clients.

projects.items.title: GestionParc
projects.items.description: Full-featured fleet management ERP module built for Dolibarr. Covers the complete vehicle lifecycle: real-time status tracking, maintenance workflows, and fuel monitoring. Digitized the entire fleet workflow, reducing manual tracking time and providing real-time operational data for 50+ vehicles.

projects.items.title: Clinique El Ihsane
projects.items.description: Bilingual French/Arabic medical clinic website (full RTL support) delivered at MCS Consulting. Built with React 18, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion and GSAP, with online appointment requests, a Strapi v5 headless CMS, Cloudinary media, Nodemailer contact system, 30+ reusable components across 7 pages, WCAG AA accessibility, and lazy-loading + code-splitting for low-end devices and slower connections.

projects.items.title: Gestion Archivage & Courrier
projects.items.description: Document and mail management system delivered at MCS Consulting for administrative teams, with structured data handling, role-based access (RBAC) and audit-style document fields. Real-time dashboard with KPIs, full document CRUD with automatic versioning, incoming/outgoing mail tracking with deadline indicators, internal messaging, bulk CSV import, drag-and-drop scanner upload, and bilingual FR/AR with RTL support. Deployed as SPA and Electron desktop app on a Supabase backend.
